{"tool_profile":"focused","factsheet_id":"factsheet_e14a01fe-a173-4670-92b7-855a3c8551cf","factsheet_version":1,"verifier_results":[{"id":"clusters-table-fields","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Schema 'tool_profile_downgraded' when profileSelection.downgraded is true."},{"id":"cluster-event-refresh","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"refreshCluster logs eventType: 'cluster_refresh' with mode logs eventType: 'factsheet_stale'."},{"id":"stale-cluster-consult-behavior","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Evidence shows stale detection: markClusterFactsheetStale called, cluster_refresh_required logged with changed_files, CLUSTER_FACTSHEET_STALE returned, and Claude never invoked (lastPrompt is undefined in test)."},{"id":"bare-profile-args","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"profileArgs function Return UNVERIFIED... Return AMBIGUOUS... Do not infer. Do not use tools. Return JSON only.'"},{"id":"orphan-explicit-session","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"When sessionFileExists returns false, code marks session orphaned and builds bootstrapContext from oldView with reason 'orphaned'."},{"id":"orphan-session-event","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"markSessionOrphaned sets status to 'orphaned' and logs eventType: 'orphan_recovery' with error: 'claude_session_missing'."},{"id":"replacement-session-created","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"When route.selectedSession is falsy, invokeClaude is called which creates a new session via startSession."},{"id":"trust-static-verified","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Code sets trustState = 'static_verified' when rejectedFacts.length === 0."},{"id":"trust-llm-verified","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Code sets trustState = 'llm_verified' when rejectedFacts.length === 0 (rejectedFacts combines static and LLM rejections)."},{"id":"trust-partial-llm","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Code sets trustState = 'partial_llm' when rejectedFacts.length > 0, which occurs when at least one fact is rejected but some remain verified."},{"id":"cluster-refresh-verify-only","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"cluster_refresh description states 'Revalidates the latest cluster factsheet by checking scoped evidence file hashes and selectors' and mode defaults to verify_only. Implementation calls verifyFactsheetStatic without Claude invocation."},{"id":"cluster-refresh-stale-semantics","verdict":"VERIFIED","reason":"Code marks stale when changedFiles.length > 0 || rejectedFacts.length > 0 and logs factsheet_stale.
